bead.title: Add injectable Clock trait to axon-core (prereq for testable time-based features)
bead.description: axon-6f138697 (idempotency keys) and axon-0fc26e99 (agent guardrails rate limiting) both require an injectable clock for deterministic time-based tests. Without a shared trait, each bead will define its own clock abstraction, leading to incompatible types. Required change: add to axon-core/src/types.rs (or a new axon-core/src/clock.rs): pub trait Clock: Send + Sync { fn now(&self) -> std::time::Instant; } with two implementations: SystemClock (wraps Instant::now()) and FakeClock { inner: Arc<Mutex<Instant>> } with a fn advance(&self, duration: Duration) method. Export both from axon-core::prelude or axon-core::clock.
bead.acceptance: Clock trait exists in axon-core; SystemClock::now() returns Instant::now(); FakeClock::now() returns the last value set; FakeClock::advance(d) moves the clock forward by d; both implement Clock + Send + Sync; IdempotencyStore and GuardrailsLayer can accept Arc<dyn Clock> for injection; a test can create FakeClock, advance past TTL, and verify eviction without sleeping
